full_description: use one arm to pick up the can, put it into the basket, and then use the same arm to lift the basket
schema: {A} notifies the can, {B} notifies the basket, {a} notifies the arm used for all actions. All actions are performed by the same single arm.
preference: num of words should not exceed 15. Degree of detail avg 8. Only one arm is used throughout. {A} and {B} should always be mentioned in each description.
